nodes.label: CheckoutForm
nodes.rationale: Client checkout island: phone-first COD/bKash form, cascade location sheets, order summary; submits to submitCheckout Server Action and handles bKash redirect / COD success.

nodes.label: LocationSheet
nodes.rationale: Cascading bottom-sheet location picker (Division/District/Thana) with Bangla+English filter; stores canonical Bangla title.

nodes.label: CheckoutPage
nodes.rationale: Server shell: resolves tenant, builds Bangla location tree server-side, renders trust strip + CheckoutForm.

nodes.label: OrderLookup
nodes.rationale: Phone-gated order lookup form; phone is the access token, submitted as a GET query param.

nodes.label: OrderPage
nodes.rationale: Order success/track page; phone-gated server component: without ?phone shows OrderLookup, with matching phone shows confirmation + status stepper.

nodes.label: ProductsPage
nodes.rationale: Storefront full-catalog grid using cached getStorefrontProducts.

nodes.label: AddToCart
nodes.rationale: PDP client island: variant picker + localStorage cart add + sticky bottom action bar.

nodes.label: ProductDetailPage
nodes.rationale: Server-rendered PDP via cached storefront data; renders AddToCart island.

nodes.label: AdminNav
nodes.rationale: Admin navigation: mobile bottom tab bar + desktop sidebar; active item via usePathname.

nodes.label: AdminLayout
nodes.rationale: Tenant admin shell; auth gate (getSession + getActiveTenantId), redirects to dev-login/platform, renders AdminNav.

nodes.label: AdminDashboardPage
nodes.rationale: Admin dashboard: metric cards, action-needed strip, recent orders via getDashboard.

nodes.label: CodPage
nodes.rationale: COD-pending list of uncollected shipments via getCodPending; honest expected total.

nodes.label: CollectionForm
nodes.rationale: Collection create/edit client form: name + product multi-select; posts saveCollection / deleteCollection.

nodes.label: CollectionsPage
nodes.rationale: Collections list via listCollections.

nodes.label: NewCollectionPage
nodes.rationale: New collection page; loads products via listProducts, renders empty CollectionForm.

nodes.label: EditCollectionPage
nodes.rationale: Edit collection page; loads getCollection + listProducts, renders prefilled CollectionForm.

nodes.label: updateCustomerNoteAndTags
nodes.rationale: Server Action: authz + Zod validate, updates customer note/tags via withTenant, revalidates customers tag.

nodes.label: CustomerSearch
nodes.rationale: Customer search + sort client component; URL-as-state via router.push.

nodes.label: CustomersPage
nodes.rationale: Customers list via listCustomers; mobile cards + desktop table; renders CustomerSearch.

nodes.label: CustomerNotes
nodes.rationale: Customer notes + tags editor client component; posts updateCustomerNoteAndTags.

nodes.label: CustomerDetailPage
nodes.rationale: Customer detail via getCustomerDetail; trust signals, order history, addresses, renders CustomerNotes.

nodes.label: updateOrderStatus
nodes.rationale: Server Action: server-validated fulfillment transition; cancel/return restores inventory atomically; blocks cancel of paid orders.

nodes.label: createManualOrder
nodes.rationale: Server Action: F-commerce manual order entry; Zod validate then placeOrder source:'manual'; revalidates tags.

nodes.label: lookupCustomer
nodes.rationale: Server Action: phone -> customer prefill via findCustomerByPhone for the manual order form.

nodes.label: searchProductsForPicker
nodes.rationale: Server Action: type-ahead product/variant search via withTenant for the manual order picker.

nodes.label: submitCheckout
nodes.rationale: External: checkout Server Action invoked by CheckoutForm.

nodes.label: useCart
nodes.rationale: External: localStorage cart hook shared by CheckoutForm and AddToCart.

nodes.label: lib/location
nodes.rationale: External: buildLocationTree + LocationTree/CascadeOption types for the Bangla location cascade.

nodes.label: auth/session
nodes.rationale: External: getSession() auth seam used by all admin pages and actions.

nodes.label: admin/data
nodes.rationale: External: getActiveTenantId(userId) resolving session user -> tenant membership.

nodes.label: admin/dashboard
nodes.rationale: External: getDashboard metrics aggregation (Asia/Dhaka day boundary).

nodes.label: admin/cod
nodes.rationale: External: getCodPending COD-owed aggregation.

nodes.label: admin/catalog
nodes.rationale: External: listCollections, listProducts, getCollection for collections pages.

nodes.label: admin/customers
nodes.rationale: External: listCustomers, getCustomerDetail, findCustomerByPhone.

nodes.label: admin/orders
nodes.rationale: External: canTransition, canCancelOrder, restoreInventory order helpers.

nodes.label: commerce/placeOrder
nodes.rationale: External: THE idempotent checkout txn; used by createManualOrder with source:'manual'.

nodes.label: products/actions
nodes.rationale: External: saveCollection / deleteCollection Server Actions used by CollectionForm.

nodes.label: Vercel for Platforms (wildcard subdomains + custom domains + SSL)
nodes.norm_label: vercel for platforms (wildcard subdomains + custom domains + ssl)

nodes.label: Guardrails (no stubs, RLS sacred, secrets encrypted)
nodes.norm_label: guardrails (no stubs, rls sacred, secrets encrypted)

nodes.label: Upstash ISR cache handler (cross-instance, NOT yet built)
nodes.norm_label: upstash isr cache handler (cross-instance, not yet built)

nodes.label: SHIFT 1 — Drop Supabase (provider-agnostic Postgres + own auth)
nodes.norm_label: shift 1 — drop supabase (provider-agnostic postgres + own auth)

nodes.label: Doreja theme / Bazaar Modern design system
nodes.norm_label: doreja theme / bazaar modern design system

nodes.label: Phase-1 status color token set + state→color map
nodes.norm_label: phase-1 status color token set + state→color map

nodes.label: Supabase Auth provider behind getSession seam
nodes.norm_label: supabase auth provider behind getsession seam
